n: A Gilded Veneer, Part 4: Another Residence

steps.t: According to Zakhâz, the entrance to Sharûla's second, secret residence is located in Tâkhdar, south of the stairs to Dâr Laja.
A lockbox in the middle of Sharûla's secret residence may contain evidence of her support for Azagath Sea-shadow.
Hármelak is in the Meeting-hall of Dâr Laja. She will be pleased to see the documents you recovered that suggest Sharûla has continued funding Azagath…
